frame_analyses.description: Right needle driver grasping needle at appropriate position, approaching Penrose drain with two visible marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper needle grip demonstrated, needle oriented for entry

frame_analyses.description: Needle being driven through first mark on Penrose drain with perpendicular entry angle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Expert technique - clean perpendicular entry through mark, proper instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Suture placement through both marks completed, preparing for knot tying
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both entry and exit points appear accurately placed on marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw (surgeon's knot) - right hand leading the wrap formation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean instrument positioning for surgeon's knot initiation

frame_analyses.description: Completing double throw of surgeon's knot with appropriate tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Expert demonstration of surgeon's knot technique with proper double throw

frame_analyses.description: Performing second throw with left hand leading, demonstrating proper hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear hand switch from first throw, single throw technique

frame_analyses.description: Performing final third throw with right hand leading again
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper alternation - right hand now leading for third throw

frame_analyses.description: Cutting suture ends with laparoscopic scissors
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting technique, both ends being cut appropriately

knot_assessments.notes: Perfect surgeon's knot demonstration with proper double throw technique
Clean single throw with proper hand switching
Final throw with proper hand alternation completed

confidence_rationale: Clear expert demonstration with excellent visibility of all key elements. Suture placement appears precise on marks, proper knot sequence clearly demonstrated, all hand switches visible.
technique_summary: Exemplary expert demonstration of intracorporeal suturing with textbook technique. Perfect execution of surgeon's knot followed by alternating single throws with proper hand switching.
strengths: Precise needle placement through both marks

common_errors_addressed: Avoiding oblique needle entry that causes mark deviation
Ensuring proper double throw for surgeon's knot
